summary: Matched the previously nonmatching menu language module, adding the full C implementation for mnlanguage.c and its header, marking the object Matching in configure.py, and tightening GALE01 split/symbol metadata for the module's data, sbss, and sdata2 ranges. The decomp.dev report credited 6 new matched functions totaling +1708 bytes in main/melee/mn/mnlanguage.
what_changed: Implemented src/melee/mn/mnlanguage.c from an effectively empty file into a 222-line matching source file.
Added declarations for mnLanguage_8024BFE0, fn_8024C210, fn_8024C270, fn_8024C2E8, mnLanguage_8024C3C4, and mnLanguage_8024C5C0 in mnlanguage.h.
Changed configure.py so melee/mn/mnlanguage.c is built as Object(Matching) instead of Object(NonMatching).
Added/staticized data symbols for mnlanguage, splitting the old broad data symbol into float Vec3 data and individual local string symbols in config/GALE01/symbols.txt.
Corrected mnlanguage section boundaries in config/GALE01/splits.txt: data end 0x803EF668 to 0x803EF661, sbss end 0x804D6C58 to 0x804D6C54, and sdata2 end 0x804DC130 to 0x804DC12C.
Refined cross-module prototypes needed by the match: lbAudioAx_80027AB0 now void lbAudioAx_80027AB0(int), lb_8001CE00 now void lb_8001CE00(void), and mn_8022F1A8 now void mn_8022F1A8(int, int).
The matched functions handle language selection input, saved-language updates, animation frame requests, text creation/cleanup, archive section loading, and menu object/proc setup.
smart_moves: Used precise function prototypes for called helpers instead of leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS, which likely helped callsite codegen and documents the actual interfaces observed from this module.
Kept mnlanguage globals that are local to the translation unit as static, matching symbol scope changes in symbols.txt.
Introduced a small language-id-to-frame map in sdata and represented animation threshold data as Vec3 statics, aligning C data layout with the object sections.
Included an explicit note that Menu_InitCenterText_noinline must not be declared inline because it affects .sdata2 float ordering, preserving a matching-sensitive detail for future maintainers.
Adjusted splits and symbols together with the source match, avoiding stale section boundaries after the module's data was understood more precisely.
decomp_lessons: When matching menu modules, source changes may require simultaneous cleanup of symbols.txt and splits.txt because local floats/strings and sbss sizes become clearer once the C data layout is known.
Replacing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS with exact prototypes in shared headers can be necessary for matching callsites in newly decompiled modules.
Inlining decisions can affect constant emission/order; a helper may need to remain noinline specifically to preserve .sdata2 float ordering.
For HSD menu code, GET_JOBJ/GET_MENU accessors, HSD_GObj user data, HSD_JObjReqAnimAll, mn_8022F3D8, and HSD_SisLib text lifecycle calls are important patterns to model accurately.
Small user-data structs may be represented locally when only field offsets are evident; this PR used anonymous/local structs for the mnlanguage state rather than over-naming weakly understood types.
naming_conventions: Matched known menu functions use the module prefix and address form, e.g. mnLanguage_8024BFE0, mnLanguage_8024C3C4, and mnLanguage_8024C5C0.
Still-unknown local callbacks retain fn_ADDRESS names, e.g. fn_8024C210, fn_8024C270, and fn_8024C2E8.

Data symbols retain address-derived names when semantic names are not yet established, e.g. mnLanguage_803EF5A0, mnLanguage_803EF5AC, mnLanguage_804A08D8, mnLanguage_804D5018, and mnLanguage_804D6C50.
Unused parameters are explicitly marked with names such as arg0_unused.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Marked mnlanguage.c Matching only after all 6 functions reached 100% according to decomp.dev.
Used static local data and symbol scope changes to align generated data with the original object.
Kept Menu_InitCenterText_noinline non-inline to preserve .sdata2 float ordering.
Adjusted section ranges to the exact observed module footprint after matching: data through 0x803EF661, sbss through 0x804D6C54, and sdata2 through 0x804DC12C.
Used typed function declarations for lbAudioAx_80027AB0, lb_8001CE00, and mn_8022F1A8 to match argument passing and return behavior.
review_feedback: No human review comments were present in the provided slice.
decomp.dev bot reported matched code +0.04% and linked code +0.04% for GALE01, with +1708 bytes and 6 new mnlanguage matches.
follow_up_queries: Find other PRs that mention noinline for .sdata2 float ordering.
Find later renames or type refinements for fn_8024C210, fn_8024C270, and fn_8024C2E8.
Find PRs that continue matching nearby menu modules mnsoundtest, mnevent, or mndatadel.
Find uses of lbAudioAx_80027AB0(int), lb_8001CE00(void), and mn_8022F1A8(int, int) after this prototype refinement.
Find mnlanguage symbol cleanup PRs that replace address-derived names with semantic names.
